Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23582763848|commit triggered pipeline]]
Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Shiribeshi | title = [[:en:Shiribeshi Subprefecture|Shiribeshi Subprefecture]] | image = | listclass = hlist | bodyclass = hlist | border = {{{border|{{#if:{{{list only|}}}|child}}}}} | state = {{{state<includeonly>|autocollapse</includeonly>}}}
| group1 = [[:en:List of cities in Hokkaido|City]] | list1 = *[[:en:Otaru|Otaru]]
| group2 = Districts | list2 = *[[:en:Abuta District, Hokkaido|Abuta District]] **[[:en:Kimobetsu, Hokkaido|Kimobetsu]] **[[:en:Kutchan, Hokkaido|Kutchan]] **[[:en:Kyōgoku, Hokkaido|Kyōgoku]] **[[:en:Makkari, Hokkaido|Makkari]] **[[:en:Niseko, Hokkaido|Niseko]] **[[:en:Rusutsu, Hokkaido|Rusutsu]] *[[:en:Furubira District, Hokkaido|Furubira District]] **[[:en:Furubira, Hokkaido|Furubira]] *[[:en:Furuu District, Hokkaido|Furuu District]] **[[:en:Kamoenai, Hokkaido|Kamoenai]] **[[:en:Tomari, Hokkaido|Tomari]] *[[:en:Iwanai District, Hokkaido|Iwanai District]] **[[:en:Iwanai, Hokkaido|Iwanai]] **[[:en:Kyōwa, Hokkaido|Kyōwa]] *[[:en:Isoya District, Hokkaido|Isoya District]] **[[:en:Rankoshi, Hokkaido|Rankoshi]] *[[:en:Shakotan District, Hokkaido|Shakotan District]] **[[:en:Shakotan, Hokkaido|Shakotan]] *[[:en:Shimamaki District, Hokkaido|Shimamaki District]] **[[:en:Shimamaki, Hokkaido|Shimamaki]] *[[:en:Suttsu District, Hokkaido|Suttsu District]] **[[:en:Kuromatsunai, Hokkaido|Kuromatsunai]] **[[:en:Suttsu, Hokkaido|Suttsu]] *[[:en:Yoichi District, Hokkaido|Yoichi District]] **[[:en:Akaigawa, Hokkaido|Akaigawa]] **[[:en:Niki, Hokkaido|Niki]] **[[:en:Yoichi, Hokkaido|Yoichi]] }}<noinclude> {{collapsible option}} [[Category:Japan prefecture templates]] [[Category:Subprefectures in Hokkaido]]
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
